answers: Fan fiction = stories written by fans using existing characters/worlds. Harry Potter, Marvel, anime are popular fandoms.
Write fanfic on: Archive of Our Own (AO3), Fanfiction.net, Wattpad. AO3 has best tagging and community.
Tips: stay true to characters, use proper tags/warnings, proofread, and engage with readers who comment.
Fan fiction is great writing practice — you already have a world and characters, so you can focus on storytelling.

feelings.question: fan fiction ki?
feelings.answer: Answers: 1. Fan fiction is great writing practice that allows you to focus on storytelling by using existing characters or worlds. 2. Harry Potter, Marvel, and other popular fandoms are examples of fan fictions. 3. Writing fanfic involves creating stories based on existing characters/worlds, following proper tagging and community standards. 4. Tips for staying true to characters, using proper tags/warnings, engaging with readers who comment, and improving your writing skills through editing, proofreading, and translation.
